dict.string:
PI Morning Driver — a personalized research-lab morning briefing.
WHAT IT DOES (all accessible to Shortcuts): • Reads today's calendar events • Reads current weather for your commute • Pulls newest arXiv papers in your field (CUSTOMIZE the category below) • Assembles everything into one briefing • Deep-links you into Slack + email + Zoom for fast triage
HONEST BOUNDARY: Shortcuts cannot read your Slack/Gmail message CONTENT or act inside those apps — no API exposes that. It opens them for you. Reading/drafting is an agent's job (e.g. Claude); this shortcut aggregates what is accessible and launches the rest.
CUSTOMIZE: arXiv category (physics.acc-ph for SLAC accelerator work — change to your field, e.g. cond-mat, hep-ex, q-bio), and your Slack workspace deep link.
☀️ Good morning, PI. Here's your lab briefing — calendar, weather, and the latest arXiv in your field. Tap through to triage Slack and email below.
